title: Bulk Edit in My Work

posts.author: dom_purple (Dom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I use the My Work view as my primary task manager day to day.

A recurring friction point is how overdue tasks are handled. If I don’t complete everything in a day, I come back the next morning to a list of overdue items that I want to reschedule to “today”.

Currently, this requires clicking on each task individually and updating the due date one by one, which is time-consuming and repetitive.

On boards, this is easily solved with bulk selection and batch updates - but this functionality isn’t available in My Work.

Request:

Introduce bulk selection and batch editing (specifically for due dates) within the My Work view.

This is a small UX improvement, but it would save meaningful time on a daily basis and make My Work much more viable as a central task management view.

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to quickly re-plan my day by rolling forward incomplete tasks from the previous day.

When I start work, I want to review anything overdue and, where appropriate, reschedule those tasks to “today” in a single action. This allows me to reset my task list and focus on execution, rather than spending time on manual admin updating each item individually.

posts.author: lAMhUAN21 (hUAN)
posts.cookedHtml: I totally get this — I end up wasting a lot of time just updating overdue tasks one by one. Being able to bulk select and change due dates directly in My Work would make starting the day so much smoother. Even a simple “move all overdue to today” option would be a game-changer for daily planning.
